title: mentha longifolia var. grandis
intro: Mentha longifolia var. grandis, also known as Horse Mint, is a variant of the peppermint plant, characterized by its larger leaves and distinctive aroma. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and act as an antispasmodic. The health benefits of Horse Mint include relief from nausea, headaches, and menstrual cramps, as well as its potential to improve respiratory health and reduce fever. Horse Mint can be consumed as a tea, added to salads, or used in herbal preparations such as oils and tinctures, making it a versatile and accessible natural remedy.
